Minimal Function Report

Analyze `normalizeName(value)` as a compact function report. - Function: trims input and returns a stable display name. - Framework: plain JavaScript helper with no external dependency. - Principle, mechanism, and design: normalize at the boundary, keep invalid input explicit, and avoid hidden state.

Overview

Function purpose, local structure, and direct flow.

Focused code evidence and state/call boundaries.

Risks, learning questions, and maintainer reference.
